expectedIssues: Sports icon is missing the the bottom nav bar
reportedIssues: The “SCROLL DOWN” overlay sits directly on top of the legal/fine-print text near the bottom of the yellow promo section, obscuring content and making the area look cluttered.
The legal disclaimer text is extremely small and low-contrast against the yellow background, making it effectively unreadable on mobile.
The fixed bottom navigation visually competes with and nearly touches the legal text area, making the page feel cramped and potentially covering content on smaller screens.
Some decorative promotional elements appear awkwardly cropped at the edges, especially the baseball on the right and coins on the left, which can make the composition feel unintentionally clipped.
The top header contains several logos and labels packed tightly together, making the branding area feel crowded on mobile.

expected.reasoning: None of the reported issues describe a missing sports icon in the bottom navigation bar; they focus on text obscuring, contrast, navigation spacing, and cropping issues.
